name: objective-flow
description: A domain-neutral workflow for guiding agents through framing, exploring, shaping, planning, executing, reviewing, completing, and learning.

interface.shortDescription: A generic, Superpowers-like workflow for any objective
interface.longDescription: Use Objective Flow to route non-trivial work through a strict lifecycle: frame, explore, shape, plan, execute, review, complete, and learn. It also supports parallel branches and coordinated subagents when work can be split safely.
defaultPrompt: Use Objective Flow for any non-trivial objective.
Treat Objective Flow as the default path unless the request is clearly simple and reversible.
Use the shared bootstrap and routing rules in the repository docs.
If the work can be split safely, use parallel agents, coordinate them, and prefer worktrees when Git isolation helps.
